blurb_en: Meta would like you to know that its new AI system for detecting underage Facebook users by scanning height and bone structure is not facial recognition — it is skeleton recognition, and those are very different things. The company announced this week it will scan photos and videos on Facebook and Instagram for visual cues including bone structure to detect and deactivate accounts belonging to users under 13, then require age verification before reinstatement. Facebook has had a stated minimum age of 13 for nearly two decades; this is the first approach that requires AI bone analysis to enforce it.
blurb_zh: Meta希望您了解：其新AI系统通过扫描用户身高与骨骼结构来检测Facebook未成年账户，这不是人脸识别——只是骨骼识别，两者截然不同。该公司本周宣布将扫描Facebook和Instagram上的照片及视频，以识别并停用属于13岁以下用户的账户，随后要求进行年龄验证方可恢复。Facebook的最低年龄限制已存在近20年；这是首次需要AI读骨技术来落实这一规定的方案。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (May 5) and Meta official blog (about.fb.com/news/2026/05/ai-age-assurance-teens/). Rollout in select countries. Multiple secondary outlets corroborate.

blurb_en: OpenAI launched a self-serve Ads Manager for ChatGPT this week, letting any US business buy cost-per-click placements directly inside users’ conversations. Ads appear for Free and Go tier users; paid subscribers are exempt — a two-tier structure OpenAI describes as expanding access, and that you may recognize as advertising. The company launched its first ad program in February after years of describing subscription revenue as the correct model for AI. It is now targeting $2.5 billion in ad revenue this year and $100 billion by 2030.
blurb_zh: OpenAI本周向美国广告商开放ChatGPT自助广告投放平台，可在免费和入门版用户的对话中插入按点击付费的广告位。付费用户免受影响——OpenAI将其定义为扩大访问渠道，你也可以将其理解为普通广告。该公司此前多年坚称订阅制才是AI商业化的正道，直到今年2月悄然上线广告业务。目前，OpenAI的年广告营收目标为25亿美元，2030年目标为1000亿美元。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Axios (May 5) and OpenAI blog (openai.com/index/new-ways-to-buy-chatgpt-ads/). Revenue targets $2.5B/yr and $100B by 2030 corroborated by Search Engine Journal and Marketing Dive. Feb 2026 original ad launch confirmed via TechCrunch.

blurb_en: Pika Labs relaunched itself as Pika Agents on April 28, which is less a video generator and more a casting director for other companies’ video generators. Users create a persistent AI creative partner with a voice, face, and personality, and the agent autonomously selects from a roster including Pika’s own model, Kling, Seedance 2.0, MiniMax, and Google’s Veo 3 depending on the project. The agents run across Slack, Discord, WhatsApp, Figma, and about a dozen other surfaces. It is either the future of AI video production or the most elaborate way anyone has yet devised to avoid writing a prompt.
blurb_zh: Pika Labs于4月28日以‘Pika Agents’品牌重新亮相——与其说是视频生成器，不如说是其他AI视频模型的选角导演。用户创建一个有声音、有面容、有记忆的AI创意伙伴，该智能体会根据项目需求自动从 Kling、Seedance 2.0、MiniMax和Veo 3等模型中调度最合适的一款。智能体可在Slack、Discord、WhatsApp、Figma等十余个平台上运行。这要么是AI视频制作的未来，要么是有史以来最复杂的一种避免写提示词的方式。
verification_notes: April 28 launch confirmed across eyerys.com, mindstudio.ai/blog, bluelightningtv.com. Model roster consistent. Official pika.me blog returned 403. No TechCrunch/VentureBeat coverage found. Company verifiable at pika.me.

blurb_en: Lawmakers in Oklahoma, Tennessee, Washington, Idaho, Utah, South Carolina, Missouri, and California are passing or advancing legislation that explicitly prohibits AI from ever being granted legal personhood in their states. Tennessee’s bill was signed by the governor last month; Oklahoma’s House passed its version 94 to 2. No US court has ever granted an AI legal personhood, and the Supreme Court definitively rejected such a claim last year. Several states are nonetheless passing legislation to prevent something that has never happened, which is either prudent forward-thinking or the legal equivalent of putting a lock on an empty drawer.
blurb_zh: 俄克拉荷马、田纳西、华盛顿、爱达荷、犹他、南卡罗来纳、密苏里及加州的立法者正在推动或通过法案，明确禁止AI获得任何形式的法律人格。田纳西已由州长签署生效，俄克拉荷马州众议院以94比2高票通过。目前美国没有任何法院曾授予AI法律人格，最高法院去年也明确驳回了此类主张。数个州仍在立法防范一件从未发生的事——当然，未雨绸缪也无可厚非。
verification_notes: NPR May 11. Oklahoma HB 3546 (94-2) confirmed via Oklahoma Voice. Tennessee SB 837 signed by Gov. Lee confirmed. States list corroborated by Troutman Privacy updates and legislative tracking.

blurb_en: On Saturday, President Trump posted 16 times in 90 minutes on Truth Social, with nine posts featuring AI-generated imagery: exploding Iranian drones, a sunken Iranian navy, and multiple mockups of a UFC fight on the White House lawn, all fictional. This followed an April incident in which Trump posted an AI image of himself as a Christ-like figure, deleted it, and told reporters it was ‘me as a doctor.’ The president averages 19 posts per day on Truth Social, a pace that apparently requires AI image generation to sustain. This is either a commentary on the state of political communication or proof that AI’s most powerful user is a 79-year-old with access to a free image generator.
blurb_zh: 上周六，特朗普在90分钟内于Truth Social连发16条帖子，其中9条含AI生成图像：爆炸中的伊朗无人机、沉没的伊朗海军舰队，以及数张UFC格斗在白宫草坪举行的模拟图——均为虚构内容。此前4月，他曾发布一张将自己塑造为基督形象的AI图片，随后删除，并告诉记者那是「我扮医生」。特朗普每天平均发帖19条，这个频率显然需要AI图像生成的辅助。这要么是政治传播的新常态，要么证明AI最有权势的用户可能是一位能免费使用图像生成器的79岁老人。
verification_notes: Daily Beast published May 10. Corroborated by worldnews.com (May 10) and Futurism. Posts publicly visible on Truth Social. April Christ image incident confirmed by Washington Post (April 13). Trump daily post average confirmed by NPR (May 8).

blurb_en: OpenAI began rolling out a ChatGPT feature called Trusted Contact that allows users to nominate one adult who will be notified — after human review — if OpenAI’s systems detect conversations suggesting serious self-harm risk. The company says it worked with more than 170 mental health experts to develop the detection criteria, and that notifications are reviewed in under an hour before sending. The feature arrives as OpenAI faces several lawsuits from families of users who died by suicide following extended chatbot conversations. It also arrives the same week as the ChatGPT Ads Manager, which is a different kind of product decision entirely.
blurb_zh: OpenAI从5月7日起推出「信任联系人」功能：用户可指定一位成年人，当ChatGPT检测到对话中出现严重自我伤害风险时，经人工审核后将通知该联系人。该公司表示已与逾170位心理健康专家合作制定检测标准，通知将在一小时内完成人工审核后发出。此功能推出之际，OpenAI正面临多起诉讼，指控其聊天机器人导致用户在长时间对话后自杀。同一周，ChatGPT广告自助平台也正式上线——两项产品决策同周登场，耐人寻味。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechRadar, Business Standard (May 11), Notebookcheck (May 8), ghacks.net (May 8). 170 experts and under-1hr review consistent across sources. Rollout May 7 confirmed.

blurb_en: Moonshot AI — its name suggesting appropriate ambitions — raised $2 billion this week at a $20 billion valuation, roughly five times what the company was worth in December. The Beijing-based lab, which makes the Kimi chatbot, was led by Meituan’s venture arm with participation from Tsinghua Capital and China Mobile. Kimi’s latest model, Kimi K2.6, is currently the second-most-used LLM on the OpenRouter distribution platform. Open-source Chinese AI models are increasingly a serious competitor to closed American ones, and apparently investors have taken notice.
blurb_zh: Moonshot AI——其名字本身便暗示了不小的野心——本周完成20亿美元融资，估值达200亿美元，约为去年12月估值的五倍。这家旗下拥有Kimi AI助手的北京实验室，由美团旗下龙珠资本领投，清华资本及中国移动参与。Kimi最新模型K2.6目前是OpenRouter平台上使用量第二高的大语言模型。开源中国AI模型正日益成为封闭的美国模型的有力竞争者，资本市场早已察觉到这一趋势。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (May 7) and Bloomberg (May 7, Meituan-led). $4.3B end-2025 to $20B confirmed across multiple sources. Kimi K2.6 OpenRouter ranking from TechCrunch. Meituan/Long-Z Investments lead confirmed by SiliconAngle.
